checkpoint: CMS-SA v0.4.6 - Authorized Repair Apply Gate and Rollback Ledger
non_claim_lock: Authorized repair apply gates are repository-bound authorization ledgers and do not prove code correctness, truth, AGI, consciousness, production readiness, security, external validation, autonomous repair authority, or real-world correctness.
primary_lock: No repair apply may execute unless it references a validated dry-run id, carries explicit human authorization, declares exact target writes, includes rollback entries for every target, preserves blocked actions, and passes the required validation stack before and after apply.
